text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In what felt like the blink of an eye, the year
comes to a close and January begins. Ines Fujin is
now set to embark on her senior year.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it isn't Fu's trainer. Here for a meal while
you work on New Year's again, huh?
choice_data_list: Yes. This is her senior year, after all!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. Chatting like this really brings back
memories. Lemme throw in a soft-boiled egg—it's
on me!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The line on the left is currently empty, so please
queue up there!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, a happy, happy new year to you, Trainer! It
never hurts to have a little extra for those rainy
days, you know!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My mom's going through a rough patch, so I want
to keep sending money back home.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But I'm saving more than I did before. This is for
my sisters' sake, too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As usual, Ines Fujin's daily life revolves around
juggling racing with working part-time jobs to
earn money for her family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But since the Arima Kinen, it's like a weight has
been lifted from her shoulders. I've noticed her
running has become more natural.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Similarly to how overworking the body can affect
the mind, it appears that alleviating her mental
burden has had a beneficial effect on her running.
choice_data_list: It seems I don't need to worry!
It seems I don't need to worry!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Nope.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
By the way, you didn't ask the ramen store owner
for any favors or anything, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
She suddenly offered to raise my hourly rate. Said
something about wanting to repay me a little for
all the good vibes I bring.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...
Hmmm?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which, I was told you went there last
New Year's, too.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Seriously?! Ramen on the first day of the new
year?! That can't be good for you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You know, I'd be in a real bind if you suddenly
got sick due to poor lifestyle choices!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You need to be careful with your health. And
make sure you take the medical checkup that the
academy provides! I don't care how busy you are!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's good, then.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Anyway... hop in line, Trainer! You're here to
offer a New Year's prayer, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The third line from the left is moving quickly! Get
going!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ushered along by Ines Fujin, I join the line to
offer a prayer. As I'm waiting, I decide what I
want to wish for this year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I put my hands together and pray for Ines Fujin's
health.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwooosh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the harsh winter cold bites my skin, I suddenly
think of Ines Fujin, still hard at work organizing
people into lines.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Is that for me?
choice_data_list: I thought you might like some tea.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: It's super warm!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin must have been feeling the cold, too.
She clutches the bag with the bottle of green tea
inside close to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I put my hands together and pray that all her
future races go well.

text_block_list.name: Shrine Visitor A
text_block_list.text:
Hey! We've finished praying, so let's go get
fortune slips!

text_block_list.name: Shrine Visitor B
text_block_list.text:
Before we get to that, I want to buy you a good
luck charm. You've got entrance exams coming
up, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Hm, a charm? You got one for me, too?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
"Wishes come true," huh... Did you buy the same
one for yourself?
choice_data_list: Yep! I want you to triumph in your races!
Yep! I want you to triumph in your races!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I guess we match! I'm gonna put mine on
my bag!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ines Fujin happily accepts the charm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pray that we'll both improve our skills over the
coming year so that she can achieve victory in her
future races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having spent the start of the new year devising
new plans, I want to hurry and share the
revamped schedule with Ines Fujin.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Are you done praying?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
For real? Want to head back together, then? I've
just finished my shift.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that I want to discuss this year's training
schedule with her on our way back.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, talk about serious! Kicking the year off a
bit uptight, aren't we?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But I guess that's just the kind of trainer I need,
huh? Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I discuss the training schedule we'll be
using for the new year with Ines Fujin.
